parsed_output.justification: Dylan admitted to being the starting Werewolf and stated he woke up alone. Brett claimed to be the Troublemaker and confirmed he swapped Dylan and Dustin. If these claims are true, Dustin became the Werewolf at the end of the night. Dustin's claim to be the Doppelganger is likely a bluff to divert suspicion from his new role as the Werewolf.
